title: Certified copies admissible in evidence
doc_html:
§329.  Certified copies admissible in evidence

Certified copies from the record of any deed, bond, mortgage, or other instrument of writing shall be admissible as evidence, and shall have the same force and effect as certified copies of the original.
doc_text:
§329.  Certified copies admissible in evidence
Certified copies from the record of any deed, bond, mortgage, or other instrument of writing shall be admissible as evidence, and shall have the same force and effect as certified copies of the original.
